They shake hands and find themselves grinning at each
other. BEN forgets what he is doing for a moment before
starting up the engine. They drive in silence for a while
and then BEN pulls into the car park of the motel.

(gets up)

The BARMAN comes over to where SERA is sitting. He speaks
quietly, not unfriendly.
BARMAN
Maybe you should give it a miss for
this evening.
He walks away. SERA finishes her drink and leaves.

EXT. THE STRIP - NIGHT
SERA at work is looking more carefully than usual, hoping

EXT. THE STRIP - NIGHT
Long lens shot of BEN, very drunk on the street. He falls

He walks into the road and tries to hail a cab but none

imitates a normal person as he walks out of shot.
